Author: John Jayson B. De Leon

Project_List.Name: Green Day Fan Base Website
Project_List.Description: My first Website created is a static fan-page website built with HTML, CSS and a touch of JavaScript. Created as a tribute to Green Day, it showcases their albums, discography and fan-content in a clean, responsive layout. This project highlights my ability to build from-scratch static websites, organize content, and apply core web fundamentals (semantic HTML, custom styling, basic JS) for a polished, fan-centric web experience.

Project_List.Name: Flask Weather App
Project_List.Description: Flask Weather App is a Python web application built with Flask that uses the OpenWeatherMap API to display current weather information for cities around the world. It supports typical Flask setup and routing, makes HTTP requests to fetch weather data, and renders results in front-end templates.

Project_List.Name: My Facebook Page Post
Project_List.Description: Flask-based Python application that integrates with the Facebook Graph API to allow posting directly to a Facebook Page. It handles user authentication, permissions, and posting workflows, letting you manage page content programmatically via a web interface.

Project_List.Name: Terminal Bank System
Project_List.Description: terminal-based banking app built with Python. It lets users create accounts, deposit or withdraw money, check balances, and view transaction history, while admins can manage accounts and logs. Data is stored in JSON files with hashed and salted encryption for security. It also has ai for financial analysis of each account.

Project_List.Name: Pokemon Information Terminal
Project_List.Description: terminal-based Python app that interfaces with a Pokémon API to let users look up Pokémon data. It provides a command-line Pokédex experience, fetching and displaying information like stats, types, and descriptions for queried Pokémon.

Project_List.Name: Calorie Tracker
Project_List.Description: terminal-based Python application that helps you log and analyze your daily calorie intake. It records meals, tracks nutritional stats over time, and uses AI-driven analytics to provide insights into eating habits. The app also presents data visually through simple statistical charts, making it easier to understand and improve diet patterns.

Title: Developer & Designer
Sub-title: Designing smart. Developing clean. Delivering impact.

Description.title: Passion On Coding
Description.desc: I’ve always been passionate about coding and technology because I enjoy turning ideas into meaningful solutions, solving problems creatively, and using Python’s versatility to build tools, automate tasks, and develop efficient solutions for complex challenges.

Description.title: Passion On Design
Description.desc: Beyond coding, I also have a strong creative side that shines through in my graphic and web design work, where I enjoy creating everything from simple logos and illustrations to polished landing pages by combining colors, layouts, and ideas to build websites that are both functional and visually appealing.

seo-description: I’m a software developer & graphic designer. Explore my portfolio of websites, apps, and creative designs built with code and creativity.

connect-description.desc: I’m always happy to talk about software, technology, and design.
